content.summary: CarMatch difficulty and lives. Gradual increase via more cars/colors. Fail=holder full (7/7), Win=board cleared. Lives normally 5 max, ~25 min regen. Currently unlimited lives event. No score display or star rating.

CM12.name: difficulty_curve_type
CM12.notes: More colors/cars at higher levels. Lv128 = 82 cars, 7 colors.

CM13.name: star_rating_system
CM13.notes: No star rating visible. May have pass/fail only.

CM14.name: score_display_exists
CM14.notes: No score HUD. Only coin count at top-left.

CM15.name: fail_condition
CM15.notes: 7/7 holder slots filled = Out of Space fail

CM16.name: win_condition
CM16.notes: Clear all cars from board to win

CM17.name: lives_max_count
CM17.notes: Currently infinity symbol (unlimited event). Normal likely 5.

CM18.name: lives_regen_minutes
CM18.notes: Cannot verify during unlimited event. Genre standard ~25 min.

design_analysis.design_intent: Extract difficulty & lives design parameters from CarMatch for puzzle genre Design DB
design_analysis.context: External game observation without source code access. Parameters estimated via ADB screenshots + pixel analysis + OCR.
strengths: Direct observation from live game build
concerns: No source code access limits parameter accuracy (~85-89%)
Some parameters require extended play sessions for full accuracy
OCR-dependent values may have recognition errors
design_analysis.reasoning: First puzzle genre entry in Design DB. CarMatch provides baseline parking-lot puzzle mechanics data.
